_extended.note: Vendor-agnostic computation params used by negotiation_tools.py to (a) derive a job-specific benchmark and (b) decompose any quoted total into fee_line_items. Switching verticals still only requires swapping this file.
_extended.fmcsa_lowball_note: FMCSA consumer guidance warns that quotes far below market are a leading indicator of hostage-load / bait-and-switch fraud; a 30%+ discount vs benchmark is treated as a Lowball Fraud Risk.
